name: Wartop
short_description: Wartop is a virtual tabletop system created specifically for playing tabletop skirmish and war games. Built from the ground up to handle the specific needs of these kinds of games. A focus on visual fidelity and ease of play.
detailed_description:
Wartop is a virtual tabletop system created specifically for playing tabletop skirmish and war games. Built from the ground up to handle the specific needs of these kinds of games. Full freedom camera controls, interactive record sheets, a universal map editor, quick spawning of dice and tokens, the ability to use assets freely between systems and once you're ready to play it takes little time to go from starting a match to actually playing.

The base game includes an implementation of Many Ages from Hobby Dungeon Games, The Streets of Erekh by David Osborne, Duel by CatZeyeS Entertainment and starter sets for Titan Forges Bloodfields, Castnplay's Nebula:All Out War, Guncraze by Actions Tactir Roleplay Gaming, Brave Sun by Blitz Gaming, Sythopian Wars by Bloodforged Games, and Revelations: Skirmish from White Light Media

Wartop is not designed as a sandbox, all game systems feature a bespoke implementation for their system to support their specific needs.

Unlocking additional systems requires purchasing them on your Wartop account. See the forums for more details.
